issues.claim: Analog not reconstructible from chapter alone
issues.objection: Removed-verse test for 7.29: if 7.29 were removed from the source pack, the chapter alone would not produce this specific engineering analog. The analog depends on the verse's specific structural claim (thread 3 (knowing-at-departure; STRETCHED; forward-pointer to Ch 8)), which is not stated equivalently elsewhere in the chapter. Tags (long-term-thinking, first-principles, operator-system-coupling) anchor on this verse's specific claim. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Heavily metaphysical and forward-pointing. Verse seeds Ch 8's adhyātma/brahman/karma typology. Engineering analog scoped at career-end substrate-articulability. Counter-example: tacit untransmitted gnosis is the failure mode of the analog.

notes: Removed-verse test for 7.29: analog is anchored on this verse's specific structural claim, not on chapter-level material alone. PASS.
